name: overseer

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix ./src/common && npm install --prefix ./src/client && npm install --prefix ./src/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix ./src/common && npm run lint --prefix ./src/client && npm run lint --prefix ./src/server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ./src/common && npm run build --prefix ./src/client
